description: Processed player-match proxy for expected threat; calculated only when passes_completed and dribbles are available
Processed player-match proxy for net action value; calculated only when passes_completed dribbles tackles_won interceptions and fouls_committed are available
Processed player-match proxy equal to passes_attempted times pass_accuracy times 0.1
Processed player-match proxy equal to distance_covered times pass completion ratio; NULL when distance_covered is missing
Processed player-match proxy equal to defensive actions divided by distance_covered; NULL when distance_covered or clearances are missing
Processed player-match PPDA-inspired proxy equal to opponent possession rate divided by defensive actions
Processed player-match workload ratio; NULL when match distance and season distance are unavailable
Processed player-match metabolic power proxy; NULL when top_speed or distance_covered are missing
Processed player-match disciplinary severity index equal to fouls_committed plus 3 yellow_cards plus 6 red_cards
Processed player-match possession-normalized involvement proxy; NULL when dribbles or possession inputs are missing
Processed goal-event xG probability placeholder; NULL until a calibrated shot-level xG model and shot population are available
Processed goal-event goals divided by xg_probability; NULL while xg_probability is unavailable
